commitMessage:
fix(events): normalize homepage date/time display to prevent off-by-one and timezone drift

- formatEventDate: format by Y-M-D at UTC midday (stable day across timezones)
- formatEventTime: literal wall-clock HH:mm -> 12-hour (no TZ conversion)
- useHomepageData: combine date + (optional) time via literal formatter; unify hero date
- getEventStatus: treat date-only as end-of-day UTC to avoid premature 'past'

Test plan:
- Create/edit events with and without time, across timezones, verify no off-by-one
- Confirm hero text matches entered date/time; cards show literal time when provided
- Regression: no implicit @10:00 PM when time omitted
